MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-20-2011 IN 206, PLAINTIFF MIRSAD KURTOVIC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF/MOVING PARTY, MARY CATHERINE WIEDERHOLD, PRESENT. NO OTHER APPEARANCES. THE COURT MADE A DISCLOSURE THAT SHE KNOWS COUNSEL, HOWEVER IT WOULD NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO RULE ON THIS MOTION. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 10/17/11 IS CONTINUED TO 4/23/12 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED, AND THE COURT WILL SEND NOTICE OF THE NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
